LinCS/tiger
The System Configuration Tool
   About    News    Docs    Download    Contact   
 

FAQ

Why is tiger having a text interface?
A machine in difficulty might not have a graphic UI. Plus, there are hosts that do not have X11 installed. On the other hand, every host has a console. Another kind of (G)UI can easily be added.

Why is tiger writen in C++?
The best text UI kit available is Turbo Vision, which is written in C++.
